headline: Unpacking Q1 Earnings: CDW (NASDAQ:CDW) In The Context Of Other IT Distribution & Solutions Stocks
summary: As the Q1 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the it distribution & solutions industry, including CDW (NASDAQ:CDW) and its peers.
